scope.summary: Bound oracle_search_source response text per source line and make every truncation visible to the caller.
out_of_scope: Live Oracle dictionary search against a database fixture.

entry_points.name: oracle_search_source MCP tool
entry_points.trace: cargo test -p oraclemcp source_search_ -- --nocapture passed the line-cap tests. A 501-character source line is bounded to the 500-character default, ends in the explicit truncation marker, retains TEXT_TRUNCATED=true and its original TEXT_CHAR_COUNT; custom caps retain the same line metadata.

entry_points.name: oracle_search_source tool schema
entry_points.trace: target/sageraven-b2c/debug/deps/oraclemcp-aef73bd2b6fdd3e6 accepted_argument_spellings_stay_advertised --nocapture passed, including the advertised max_line_chars parameter and its documented 16..4000 bounds.

limitations: Scoped tests only; the repository-wide Required gate was not run in this pane.
No live Oracle source-search fixture was exercised.
